YouTube Downloader.changelog:
• Introduced global ExoPlayer for seamless playback across videos.
• Fixed fullscreen rotation causing black/blank video screen.
• Improved video player stability and reduced UI flicker.
• Optimized navigation between suggested videos (no reload).
• Fixed PIP mode incorrectly triggering on exit.
• Better state handling across screens.
• General bug fixes and performance improvements.

DasMediaHub.changelog:
• Added global ExoPlayer for smoother video switching.
• Fixed blank screen issue during fullscreen rotation.
• Improved suggestions navigation without recreating player.
• Fixed PIP mode ignoring state on exit.
• Improved search result persistence when returning from player.
• Enhanced UI states (error, empty, loading).
• General bug fixes and performance improvements.
